recommendations.title: How to Get Ahead in Advertising
recommendations.overview: Pressure from his boss and a skin-cream client produces a talking boil on a British adman's neck.

recommendations.title: Jennifer Eight
recommendations.overview: John Berlin, a big-city cop from LA moves to a small-town police force and immediately finds himself investigating a murder. Using theories rejected by his colleagues, Berlin meets a young blind woman named Helena, whom he is attracted to. Meanwhile,

recommendations.title: Romeo and Juliet
recommendations.overview: Romeo Montague and Juliet Capulet fall in love against the wishes of their feuding families. Driven by their passion, the young lovers defy their destiny and elope, only to suffer the ultimate tragedy.

recommendations.title: The Blue Umbrella
recommendations.overview: It is just another evening commute until the rain starts to fall, and the city comes alive to the sound of dripping rain pipes, whistling awnings and gurgling gutters.

recommendations.title: The Story of Adèle H.
recommendations.overview: In the 19th century a mysterious woman named Adele H. crosses the ocean, from Europe to North America, to relentlessly pursue a handsome officer that denies her satisfaction.

recommendations.title: The House
recommendations.overview: Across different eras, a poor family, an anxious developer and a fed-up landlady become tied to the same mysterious house in this animated dark comedy.
recommendations.director: Paloma Baeza, Emma De Swaef, Marc James Roels, Niki Lindroth von Bahr

recommendations.title: The Last One for the Road
recommendations.overview: A couple of jovial life-long drunkards run into a shy architecture undergrad, whose way of seeing things will be transformed as the trio wanders from pub to pub in search of a buried treasure.

recommendations.title: The Lost Weekend
recommendations.overview: Longtime alcoholic Don Birnam has been sober for ten days and appears to be over the worst... but his craving has just become more insidious. Evading a country weekend planned by his brother and girlfriend, he begins a four-day bender that just might

recommendations.title: Where Is The Friend's House?
recommendations.overview: An 8-year-old boy must return his friend's notebook he took by mistake, lest his friend be punished by expulsion from school.

recommendations.title: The Rum Diary
recommendations.overview: Tired of the noise and madness of New York and the crushing conventions of late Eisenhower-era America, itinerant journalist Paul Kemp travels to the pristine island of Puerto Rico to write for a local San Juan newspaper run by the downtrodden editor
